baselineCommands.name: iosSimulatorInnerBuild
baselineCommands.diagnostic: .NET for iOS 26.4.11514-net11-p4 requires Xcode 26.4; installed Xcode is 26.2.

environmentBlockers.description: .NET for iOS 26.4.11514-net11-p4 requires Xcode 26.4. The installed Xcode version is 26.2, so the iOS simulator baseline build is blocked until Xcode is updated or the .NET iOS workload is changed.
environmentBlockers.manualAction: Install Xcode 26.4 or use a .NET iOS workload compatible with Xcode 26.2.
